definition: Existence or becoming within the form domain.
notes: The repository keeps form existence as the default because it aligns with the related handling of rūpa-rāga and the threefold bhava framework. Material existence is discouraged because it confuses the term with crude materialism rather than the doctrinal category of form realms or form-mode becoming.

context_rules.context: In the three modes of existence framework
In explanatory prose emphasizing process rather than domain
context_rules.notes: Allowed alternate where continuity with bhava-language matters.

context_rules.context: When the passage is classifying levels of becoming or rebirth
context_rules.notes: Use when a fuller phrase helps modern readers.

example_phrases.notes: One member of the threefold bhava framework.
